Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Felrex]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 18''' — Felrex is the King Regent of Karosha.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — Felrex is a usurper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — Felrex has the resources of the Karoshan Alliance at his command.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — Felrex is a contender for the throne of Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — Felrex is a King Regent receiving support from someone high up in the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — Felrex may have orchestrated a trap.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Felrex is a possible commander of the Perfected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Felrex would not order his Perfected into a suicidal charge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — Felrex is a character who can produce more Perfected.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Felrex is a figure mentioned by Tythalia regarding the loyalty of colonists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Felrex is someone Shyrax's children are hiding from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Felrex is an entity or group that Veshran has remained independent from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — Felrex needs resources to stabilize his systems.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Felrex is a member of Shyrax's family and was a Perfected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — Veshran would never defeat Felrex.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
